form.formComment: Useful type. Freshened for 35 days. Last start finished 18th of 23 starters at Cheltenham on March 12 over 5300m, 57 len behind Ask Brewster carrying 73kg at $67. Race before ran last at Musselburgh on January 31 over 4100m, 21 len behind Jpr One carrying 65.5kg at $4.30. Definite winning chance. Finds a suitable contest and is worth including.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming finished fourth of 9 runners at Exeter on March 6 over 3800m, 12 len behind Genois with 75.5kg at $15. Second-up pulled up at Haydock Park on April 4 over 4000m. Will need to lift. More needed now.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after five months finished sixth of 7 starters at Newbury on March 21 over 4000m, 41 len behind Prairie Wolf with 68kg at $23. Previously second-up finished fourth in a small field at Newton Abbot on August 21 over 3280m, 10 len behind Centara carrying 71kg at $8. Improvement in store.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after five months favourite; won by 2.25 len Chepstow on March 15 over 3200m on rain affected going defeating Milan Tino carrying 76kg at $2.10 in a steeplechase. Previously second-up finished third in a small field at Kempton Park on October 19 over 3600m, 8 len behind Bluey carrying 74.5kg at $10. Fitter and expected to go on with it.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Last run favourite; won by 24 len Ascot on March 29 over 4200m defeating Diplomatic Ash carrying 74kg at $2.90 in a steeplechase. The run before to post a big 14 len win. Exeter on March 17 over 3800m defeating Captain Boudet carrying 73.5kg at $2.80 in a steeplechase. Has been racing well. Clearly the one they have to beat again.
